message:
fix(conformance): restore run_bd in init_both and format long lines

Fix init_both() to use run_bd() instead of run_br_in_bd_env() for
proper bd initialization. The bd binary should be used directly when
initializing the bd workspace.

Also apply rustfmt to long lines in conformance_list_filter tests
that exceeded the line length limit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
